name: It Sits Upon A Pale Horse

phase_0.domain_name: It Sits Upon A Pale Horse
phase_0.boundary_condition: the horizon where sky meets earth — the event boundary of revelation

VINIT.chosen_element: the void before the rider appears
VINIT.justification: uninitialized state; the pale horse does not yet exist in perception; pure potentiality before manifestation

TANCH.chosen_element: the pale horse itself — the terminal anchor
TANCH.justification: the closed boundary that contains the entire system; the horse is the hermetic vessel, the sealed form that holds all meaning

AFWD.chosen_element: the rider's descent — forward morphism toward the earth
AFWD.justification: directed transformation; the rider moves downward, approaching, manifesting; ascent of intention into material form

AREV.chosen_element: the horse's pallor — reverse morphism, parity flip
AREV.justification: contravariant descent; the whiteness is death-color, the inverse of life; composting, dissolution, the return to void

CLINK.chosen_element: the bond between rider and horse — composition
CLINK.justification: sequential chaining; rider and horse are inseparable morphisms; one cannot move without the other; root→derived form

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the pale horse recognizing itself as pale — identity
IMSCRIB.justification: self-reference; the horse is itself; the stone that knows itself; the system witnessing its own form

FSPLIT.chosen_element: the moment of arrival — the pale horse splits into two interpretations
FSPLIT.justification: co-multiplication; one horse branches into [salvation/judgment] or [death/renewal]; the bilingual sign; the hard/soft distinction

FFUSE.chosen_element: the reconciliation — both branches reconstitute the pale horse
FFUSE.justification: multiplication; salvation AND judgment are one; death AND renewal are one; the trilateral root recovers its base form; FFUSE(FSPLIT(pale horse)) = pale horse

EVALT.chosen_element: the affirmative reading — the rider brings judgment and justice
EVALT.justification: true/affirmative branch; positive evaluation; the horse is herald of divine will; T-arm activation

EVALF.chosen_element: the negative reading — the rider brings death and pestilence
EVALF.justification: false/negative branch; negative evaluation; the horse is herald of apocalypse; F-arm activation

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the paradice — the pale horse is BOTH savior and destroyer, held without resolution
ENGAGR.justification: both simultaneously; cuneiform polysemous sign; bicameral compromise; the albedo stage where opposites coexist; B-state (11)

IFIX.chosen_element: the moment the pale horse is seen — permanent record, append-only
IFIX.justification: ROM fixation; once witnessed, the vision cannot be unseen; the dream journal entry; the measurement record of apocalypse; irreversible

split_outputs: the horse as divine messenger (T-arm: salvation, judgment, order)
the horse as harbinger of death (F-arm: pestilence, chaos, dissolution)
phase_2.fuse_result: the unified pale horse — both readings held as one apocalyptic sign

phase_3.void_description: 00 — the moment before the pale horse appears; no rider, no horse, no vision; pure potentiality; the dreamer asleep
phase_3.true_description: 01 — the pale horse is present and affirmed; the rider sits upon it; judgment is real; the vision is true; forward motion
phase_3.false_description: 10 — the pale horse is present but negated; death is real; dissolution is real; the inverse reading; descent into void
phase_3.both_description: 11 — the pale horse is BOTH affirmed and negated simultaneously; salvation and death are one; the paradice; the albedo stage where all opposites coexist without resolution

steps.domain_action: the void before the pale horse exists — no rider, no horse, no vision; pure potentiality in the dreamer's sleep
the rider begins to descend — forward morphism; intention manifests; the horse begins to materialize from the void
the horse's pallor emerges — reverse morphism; whiteness as death-color; the inverse of life; parity flip into the shadow realm
the rider and horse bond — composition; they become inseparable; one morphism chains to the next; root→derived form
the pale horse recognizes itself — identity; the stone that knows itself; self-reference; the system witnesses its own form
the pale horse arrives and splits — co-multiplication; one horse branches into [salvation/judgment] and [death/renewal]; the bilingual sign
the T-arm activates — affirmative reading; the rider brings divine judgment; the horse is herald of order; positive evaluation
forward motion along the T-arm — the horse carries the rider toward the earth; manifestation of justice; ascent of intention
the T-arm reconstitutes — the affirmative reading fuses back into the pale horse; salvation is real
the F-arm activates — negative reading; the rider brings death and pestilence; the horse is herald of chaos; negative evaluation
reverse motion along the F-arm — the horse descends into dissolution; death is real; parity flip; composting
the F-arm reconstitutes — the negative reading fuses back into the pale horse; death is real
the paradice emerges — both T-arm and F-arm are held simultaneously; salvation AND death are one; the albedo stage; B-state (11)
the pale horse is the terminal anchor — the closed boundary that contains the entire system; the hermetic vessel; the sealed form
the vision is fixed — permanent record, append-only; once witnessed, the pale horse cannot be unseen; the dream journal entry; irreversible
the pale horse recognizes itself again — self-reference loop; the system witnesses its own completion; identity at the boundary
the final composition — rider and horse remain bonded; the morphism chain is complete; root→derived form is sealed

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the dreamer's unconscious mind — what translates apocalyptic intention into the vision of the pale horse; the alchemical furnace where symbol becomes image
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the bond between rider and horse — how the two components communicate; the reins; the breath; the shared heartbeat; the morphism that chains them
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the dream journal — how the vision is stored and retrieved; the pale horse is recorded in the dreamer's memory as both real and unreal; the paradice persists
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the apocalyptic clock — what determines the order and timing of the rider's descent; the moment of arrival is predetermined; the vision unfolds in sacred time
phase_5.alfs_store: the Book of Revelation — the canonical reference; the pale horse is the fourth seal; the bootstrap store for all apocalyptic imagery; the source code of the vision

phase_6.cycle_cost: the dreamer's attention — each cycle of the pale horse's manifestation consumes the dreamer's capacity to distinguish dream from waking; the cost is paid in lucidity
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: the dreamer asleep, void of vision; the pale horse does not yet exist; entropy is low; the system is uninitialized
phase_6.post_cycle_state: the dreamer haunted by the pale horse; the vision is fixed in memory; the paradice is held; entropy is conserved — the vision neither increases nor decreases in power; it simply IS
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the pale horse is a closed system; it manifests and dissolves in perfect balance; salvation and death cancel each other; the vision is entropy-conservative because it is both real and unreal simultaneously, held in the albedo stage where all opposites coexist without resolution

lean_scaffold:
